DS
Design System

Dashboard

Painel de controle com métricas em cards, abas de conteúdo, estado de carregamento via Skeleton e alert contextual. Base para produtos SaaS e apps de gestão. Control panel with metric cards, content tabs, Skeleton loading state, and contextual alert. Foundation for SaaS products and management apps.

Card Tabs Badge Avatar Skeleton Alert Button

Preview

Visão geralOverview

Período: últimos 30 diasPeriod: last 30 days

AL

Novo relatório disponívelNew report available

O relatório mensal de maio foi gerado. Ver relatório The May monthly report has been generated. View report

Receita totalTotal revenue

R$ 48.320

↑ 12% vs mês anterior↑ 12% vs last month

Novos clientesNew clients

1.284

↑ 8% vs mês anterior↑ 8% vs last month

Taxa de churnChurn rate

2,4%

↑ 0,3% vs mês anterior↑ 0.3% vs last month 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Dashboard</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/design-system.css">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: var(--ds-background-subtle); min-height: 100vh; margin: 0; padding: var(--ds-dimension-32); }
    .dash-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: var(--ds-dimension-16); margin-bottom: var(--ds-dimension-32); }
    .dash-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--ds-dimension-12); margin-bottom: var(--ds-dimension-12); }
    .dash-row-meta { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--ds-dimension-6); }
    @media (max-width: 768px) { .dash-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- App header -->
<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-32)">
  <div>
    <h1 style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-2xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-4)">Visão geral</h1>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0">Período: últimos 30 dias</p>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--ds-dimension-12)">
    <button class="ds-button ds-button--outline ds-button--sm">
      <span class="ds-button__label">Exportar</span>
    </button>
    <div class="ds-avatar" aria-label="Ana Lima" title="Ana Lima">AL</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Alert -->
<div class="ds-alert ds-alert--info ds-alert--subtle" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-24)" role="status">
  <div class="ds-alert__content">
    <p class="ds-alert__title">Novo relatório disponível</p>
    <span class="ds-alert__description">O relatório mensal de maio foi gerado. <a class="ds-link" href="#">Ver relatório</a></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Metric cards -->
<div class="dash-grid">
  <div class="ds-card ds-card--outlined" style="padding:var(--ds-dimension-20)">
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">Receita total</p>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-2xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">R$ 48.320</p>
    <span class="ds-badge ds-badge--success ds-badge--subtle">↑ 12% vs mês anterior</span>
  </div>
  <div class="ds-card ds-card--outlined" style="padding:var(--ds-dimension-20)">
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">Novos clientes</p>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-2xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">1.284</p>
    <span class="ds-badge ds-badge--success ds-badge--subtle">↑ 8% vs mês anterior</span>
  </div>
  <div class="ds-card ds-card--outlined" style="padding:var(--ds-dimension-20)">
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-sm);color:var(--ds-content-default);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">Taxa de churn</p>
    <p style="font-size:var(--ds-body-font-size-2xl);font-weight:var(--ds-body-font-weight-bold);color:var(--ds-content-strong);margin:0 0 var(--ds-dimension-8)">2,4%</p>
    <span class="ds-badge ds-badge--warning ds-badge--subtle">↑ 0,3% vs mês anterior</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Table card with tabs -->
<div class="ds-card ds-card--outlined" style="padding:var(--ds-dimension-24)">
  <div class="ds-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard sections" style="margin-bottom:var(--ds-dimension-24)">
    <button class="ds-tab ds-tab--active" role="tab" aria-selected="true" id="tab-tx" aria-controls="panel-tx">Transações</button>
    <button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" id="tab-cl" aria-controls="panel-cl">Clientes</button>
    <button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" id="tab-pr" aria-controls="panel-pr">Produtos</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Replace skeleton rows with real data once loaded -->
  <div id="panel-tx" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="tab-tx">
    <div class="dash-row">
      <div class="ds-skeleton ds-skeleton--circle" style="width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0"></div>
      <div class="dash-row-meta">
        <div class="ds-skeleton ds-skeleton--text" style="width:55%"></div>
        <div class="ds-skeleton ds-skeleton--text" style="width:35%"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ds-skeleton ds-skeleton--text" style="width:80px"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- Repeat rows as needed -->
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>

Notas de usoUsage notes

PadrãoPatternDecisãoDecision
Skeleton como estado inicialas initial stateSubstitua as linhas de Skeleton pelos dados reais ao receber a resposta da API. Skeleton evita layout shift (CLS) e comunica que há conteúdo chegando.Replace Skeleton rows with real data once the API responds. Skeleton prevents layout shift (CLS) and communicates that content is incoming.
ds-card--outlinedCards de métrica usam --outlined (borda, sem sombra) pois estão sobre fundo sutil — sombra acumularia visualmente.Metric cards use --outlined (border, no shadow) since they sit on a subtle background — shadows would stack visually.
ds-badge--success/warningCor semântica comunica variação positiva/negativa sem depender só de ícone ou texto — atende WCAG 1.4.1 (uso de cor).Semantic color communicates positive/negative variation without relying solely on icon or text — meets WCAG 1.4.1 (use of color).
Grid responsivoresponsiveColapse de 3 para 1 coluna via media query no mobile — os cards de métrica são igualmente importantes em telas pequenas.Collapse from 3 to 1 column via media query on mobile — metric cards are equally important on small screens.

Templates relacionadosRelated templates

ConfiguraçõesSettings Ver todos os templatesAll templates
